item.title: What’s Been Missing on This Tractor
item.description: A tractor inspection reveals a missing component, showing diagnostics, troubleshooting, and how small issues can affect machine performance.

media:content.media:title: What’s Been Missing on This Tractor
media:content.media:description: A tractor inspection reveals a missing component, showing diagnostics, troubleshooting, and how small issues can affect machine performance.

item.title: So Excited on the Farm Moment
item.description: A genuine farm moment captures excitement during daily work, showing reactions, progress, and the energy of hands-on agricultural life.

media:content.media:title: So Excited on the Farm Moment
media:content.media:description: A genuine farm moment captures excitement during daily work, showing reactions, progress, and the energy of hands-on agricultural life.

item.title: How Corn Quality Is Checked
item.description: A look at how corn quality is tested on the farm, showing sampling, inspection methods, and steps used to ensure crop standards are met.

media:content.media:title: How Corn Quality Is Checked
media:content.media:description: A look at how corn quality is tested on the farm, showing sampling, inspection methods, and steps used to ensure crop standards are met.

item.title: A Beautiful Day Outdoors on the Farm
item.description: A peaceful day on the farm showcases outdoor work, scenery, and the calm moments that come with agricultural life in good weather.

media:content.media:title: A Beautiful Day Outdoors on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A peaceful day on the farm showcases outdoor work, scenery, and the calm moments that come with agricultural life in good weather.

item.title: Hauling Loads From the Field
item.description: Farm equipment moves harvested material from the field, showing loading, transport, and the logistics behind efficient agricultural operations.

media:content.media:title: Hauling Loads From the Field
media:content.media:description: Farm equipment moves harvested material from the field, showing loading, transport, and the logistics behind efficient agricultural operations.

item.title: Inside a Combine Harvester
item.description: A look inside a combine harvester, showing controls, harvesting process, and how grain is efficiently collected during field operations.

media:content.media:title: Inside a Combine Harvester
media:content.media:description: A look inside a combine harvester, showing controls, harvesting process, and how grain is efficiently collected during field operations.

item.title: This Feels Nice on the Farm
item.description: A satisfying farm moment highlights smooth operations, good conditions, and the enjoyment of hands-on agricultural work.

media:content.media:title: This Feels Nice on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A satisfying farm moment highlights smooth operations, good conditions, and the enjoyment of hands-on agricultural work.

item.title: First Safety Upgrade on the Farm
item.description: A first farm safety upgrade is installed, showing equipment improvements, practical changes, and steps taken to enhance operator safety.

media:content.media:title: First Safety Upgrade on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A first farm safety upgrade is installed, showing equipment improvements, practical changes, and steps taken to enhance operator safety.

item.title: Hauling 70,000 Pounds of Grain
item.description: A heavy grain haul showcases large-scale farm logistics, loading operations, and the effort required to move 70,000 pounds efficiently.

media:content.media:title: Hauling 70,000 Pounds of Grain
media:content.media:description: A heavy grain haul showcases large-scale farm logistics, loading operations, and the effort required to move 70,000 pounds efficiently.

item.title: Immaculate Farm Views
item.description: A scenic look at farm landscapes highlights wide-open fields, peaceful surroundings, and the beauty of agricultural life outdoors.

media:content.media:title: Immaculate Farm Views
media:content.media:description: A scenic look at farm landscapes highlights wide-open fields, peaceful surroundings, and the beauty of agricultural life outdoors.

item.title: A Girl and Her Big Rig
item.description: A powerful big rig is driven and managed with confidence, showing trucking skills, road work, and life behind the wheel of heavy equipment.

media:content.media:title: A Girl and Her Big Rig
media:content.media:description: A powerful big rig is driven and managed with confidence, showing trucking skills, road work, and life behind the wheel of heavy equipment.

item.title: The Real Price of Farming
item.description: A look at the true cost of farming, covering expenses, risks, equipment, and the financial realities behind running a modern agricultural operation.

media:content.media:title: The Real Price of Farming
media:content.media:description: A look at the true cost of farming, covering expenses, risks, equipment, and the financial realities behind running a modern agricultural operation.
